title: Here’s the Celtics’ 2026 Summer League roster and schedule
author: Khari A. Thompson
bullets: Hugo Gonzalez, a second-year guard, headlines the Celtics' 2026 Summer League roster.
The roster includes 2026 draft picks Chris Cenac Jr. and Dillon Mitchell.
The Celtics' Summer League schedule starts on July 10 against the Raptors at Cox Pavilion.

title: Tartan Army makes a big donation to help Mass. students in need
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Tartan Army donated $15,000 to the Massachusetts Child charity to assist students in need.
The Scottish fan club saved funds by using school buses for World Cup matches in Foxborough.
Donation will help students experiencing economic hardship purchase clothing, books, and school supplies.

title: Your neighborhood Cumbies could soon look a little different
author: Beth Treffeisen
bullets: Cumberland Farms' parent company filed for a public offering, planning nationwide expansion and store renovations.
Plans include renovating 60 Cumberland Farms locations annually, targeting 600 to 700 rebranding across its U.S. network.
Cumberland Farms operates 1,500 retail locations with plans to introduce Krispy Krunch Chicken at selected sites.

title: Boston sues social media companies over ‘addictive’ features, joining nationwide litigation
author: Ross Cristantiello
bullets: Boston sues Meta, TikTok, Snapchat, and YouTube, alleging deliberate targeting of minors with addictive features.
The lawsuit is part of over 1,500 similar complaints and seeks compensation for student mental health support.
Boston Public Schools report rising mental health issues linked to social media, increasing support staff significantly since 2007.

title: Cyclospora, the explosive diarrhea parasite, has reached Mass. Here’s what to know.
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Massachusetts reports 18 cyclosporiasis cases from May 1 to July 7, similar to usual seasonal numbers, says DPH.
The CDC reports 145 national cyclosporiasis cases through June 16, excluding nearly 800 cases in Michigan.
Cyclospora infections spread via contaminated food or water; past outbreaks linked to fresh produce like basil and raspberries.

title: Jaylen Brown says he and Patriots WR A.J. Brown are cousins
author: Khari A. Thompson
bullets: Jaylen Brown revealed he is cousins with A.J. Brown, sharing a grandfather-grandson relationship.
Jaylen Brown, traded to the 76ers, and A.J. Brown, traded to the Patriots, both seek their second championships.
Jaylen Brown and A.J. Brown, both 29, have southern roots and won titles in their respective sports in 2024.

title: Carles Gil selected for 2026 MLS All-Star roster
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: Carles Gil of New England Revolution named to the 2026 MLS All-Star roster for the fifth time.
The All-Star game will be against LIGA MX's All-Star squad in Charlotte on July 29.
Gil, 33, earned a coach’s selection with 5 goals and 4 assists in 14 games this season.

title: Massachusetts man who fell ill in Fiji dies
author: Beth Treffeisen
bullets: Scott "Scooter" Winslow of Holbrook, Massachusetts, died after falling critically ill in Fiji from an infection possibly caused by an insect bite.
Winslow's condition worsened in Fiji, leading to his hospitalization in intensive care; a request for medflight to Mass General was denied.
Winslow's daughters traveled 8,000 miles to bid farewell before his passing, following a GoFundMe campaign to support the family.

title: The Brigham and Women’s Hospital nurses strike is underway. Here’s what to know.
author: Beth Treffeisen
bullets: Over 4,000 nurses strike at Brigham and Women's Hospital in Boston, organized by the Massachusetts Nurses Association.
The strike stems from failed negotiations over pay increases, health insurance, and workplace protections with Mass General Brigham.
The hospital remains operational, with replacement nurses covering shifts and patients advised to allow extra travel time.

title: 2 of the most charming main streets in America are in New England, according to Travel + Leisure
author: Kristi Palma
bullets: Nantucket, Massachusetts, and Brunswick, Maine, are highlighted as charming main streets by Travel + Leisure.
Nantucket's Main Street features 1800s Greek Revival homes, cafés, and boutiques, evoking historical charm.
Brunswick's Maine Street offers a community-driven atmosphere with independent shops and eateries since 1965.
